data.title: Invitation to Saab's Q1 2026 interim report presentation
data.description: Saab's CEO Micael Johansson and CFO Anna Wijkander will discuss the company's performance in the first quarter of 2026 on April 23 at 10:00 a.m. CET. The interim report will be available at 07:30 a.m. CET on the same day on Saab's website.

data.title: Advenica Launches a new USB Malware Scanner
data.description: In Malmö, Sweden, on April 9, 2026, Advenica, a prominent Swedish cybersecurity solutions provider, unveiled its newest product, the Advenica File Scanner Kiosk. This cutting-edge innovation aims to safeguard businesses from the increasing threat of malware. The user-friendly and robust kiosk is designed to offer comprehensive protection to businesses, delivering peace of mind in the digital landscape.

data.title: Taiwan-Based Towards Buddha Co., Ltd. Showcases Medical-Grade TPU Tubing Injection Solutions at Medtec Japan 2026
data.description: Tainan, on April 9th, 2026 - Towards Buddha Co., Ltd., a company located in Taiwan known for producing medical-grade plastic parts, is set to showcase its advanced TPU tubing injection manufacturing solutions at Medtec Japan 2026 this month. The company will be partnering with ICP DAS BMP for this exhibition.

data.title: E3 Lithium Files 2025 Year-End Financial Results and Disclosure Documents
data.description: E3 Lithium Ltd., a prominent Canadian lithium development company trading on the TSXV (ETL), FSE (OW3), and OTCQX (EEMMF), announced the submission of its consolidated financial statements for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025. Alongside the financial statements, the Management’s Discussion and Analysis (MD&A) and Annual Information Form (AIF) were also filed. These documents are accessible through the company’s profile on SEDAR+ at www.sedarplus.ca and E3 Lithium's official website at www.e3lithium.ca.

data.title: Cosmos (ATOM) aims for $1.83 breakout from $1.79 with RSI 53.24. Support at $1.73 crucial for uptrend. Trend analysis indicates a potential rally.
data.description: The cryptocurrency ATOM is currently trading at a value of $1.79, while its Relative Strength Index (RSI) stands at a neutral level of 53.24. Analysis based on technical indicators indicates that there is a likelihood of testing a resistance level at $1.83. It is crucial for the bullish trend to persist that the support level of $1.73 holds firm.

data.title: Ativion Raises the Bar for Schools With Expanded iPad Classroom Visibility and Safeguarding
data.description: Ativion, a prominent platform provider focusing on student safety and well-being through smart analytics, has revealed the expansion of its primary safeguarding platform, StudentKeeper, in Nottingham, England. The latest version of StudentKeeper now includes crucial features essential for overseeing a contemporary classroom setting, notably incorporating iPad support. This update allows schools to have comprehensive oversight of iPad usage, offering insight and control over student activity.

data.title: UNI may reach $3.50-$3.76 by May 2026 with current price at $3.09 & RSI at 37.13 indicating oversold market, indicating a 13-22% potential increase.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Uniswap (UNI) is currently being traded at a value of $3.09, showing a Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 37.13 which indicates oversold conditions. Through technical analysis, it is projected that there is a potential 13-22% increase in value, with a focus on reaching resistance levels in the market.
